title: Kanye West ‘Should Never Have Been Invited,’ Starmer Says After Barring Rapper From UK
summary_full: Prime Minister Keir Starmer’s government blocked the artist formerly known as Kanye West from entering Britain for the three-day Wireless Festival in July.
summary_public: Prime Minister Keir Starmer’s government blocked the artist formerly known as Kanye West from entering Britain for the three-day Wireless Festival in July.
